label: Merchants Pak
blurb: Specialty Retail, Thrift & Pawn Shops. Inventory sourcing, dynamic pricing, and authentication.

skills.label: Consignment Payout Reconciler
skills.method: When a vintage jacket sells, automatically calculates the 60/40 split and pushes the funds to the original owner via Venmo/ACH, emailing a receipt.
trigger_examples: automates the hardest part of consignment accounting

skills.label: Dry Cleaner Stain Liability Waiver
skills.method: Generates an instant SMS waiver when a customer drops off a $2,000 silk dress with a red wine stain, requiring them to acknowledge the risk of fabric damage before cleaning starts.
trigger_examples: prevents small businesses from replacing expensive wardrobes

skills.label: Thrift Store Color Tag Rotator
skills.method: Tells volunteer staff exactly which colored tags (e.g., "pull all yellow tags") have been on the floor for \>4 weeks and need to be salvaged to rag-buyers today.
trigger_examples: keeps thrift store floors fresh and turning over

skills.label: Bicycle Shop Tuneup Nudge
skills.method: Texts buyers exactly 6 months after buying a mountain bike, reminding them to bring it in for the free gear-cable tension adjustment.
trigger_examples: drives foot traffic back into the store for high-margin accessory upsells

skills.label: Tailor Alteration Ticket Router
skills.method: Translates the front-desk notes ("hem 2 inches, take in waist, keep original stitching") into the back-room seamstress's native language.
trigger_examples: prevents ruined garments due to language barriers

skills.label: Florist Stem Yield Calculator
skills.method: Takes 5 upcoming wedding mood boards, calculates exactly how many white hydrangeas and eucalyptus stems are needed, and generates the wholesale Dutch auction order.
trigger_examples: stops florists from bleeding margin on dead flowers

skills.label: Jeweler Scrap Gold Calculator
skills.method: Multiplies the gram weight by the specific karat purity against the live spot price of gold, subtracting the refiner's melt-fee margin to give a cash offer.

skills.label: Pawn Shop Ebay Comp Puller
skills.method: Takes a photo of a Makita drill or a vintage guitar, instantly scraping "Completed/Sold" eBay listings to tell the pawnbroker exactly how much cash to offer.
trigger_examples: prevents pawnbrokers from overpaying for dead inventory

skills.label: Record Store Discogs Pricer
skills.method: Scans vinyl barcodes or matrix runout numbers to auto-print price tags based on the median historical value on the Discogs marketplace.
trigger_examples: turns junior clerks into expert music appraisers

skills.label: Comic Shop Pull List Manager
skills.method: Cross-references the weekly Diamond distributor shipment against loyal customers' subscription lists, automatically boxing their comics and texting them to pick up.
